reefer.tagline: How many pallets fit in a Crystal reefer container? Euro, standard, and trolley configurations for 10ft, 20ft, and 40ft units.
notes: Pallet counts assume single-layer floor loading. Double-stacking possible where cargo height permits.
Euro pallet: 1,200 × 800 mm. Standard/UK pallet: 1,200 × 1,000 mm.
Trolley configurations vary by product type. Counts shown are indicative.
Actual capacity depends on cargo height, weight, and loading method.

blast-freezer.tagline: Pallet capacity for Crystal blast freezer containers. 20ft and 40ft configurations for rapid freezing of seafood, meat, and processed foods.
notes: Blast freezer containers have evaporator units that reduce usable floor area vs standard reefers.
Freezing capacity (MT/day) is distinct from storage capacity — product is cycled through.
Euro pallet: 1,200 × 800 mm. Standard/UK pallet: 1,200 × 1,000 mm.
Dual-machine 40ft configurations available for continuous operation with redundancy.

super-freezer.tagline: Pallet capacity for Crystal super freezer containers. Ultra-low temperature storage down to −70°C for biologics, specialty pharma, and research applications.
notes: Super freezer units have additional insulation and refrigeration equipment reducing usable space.
At −70°C, product must be loaded rapidly to maintain temperature — pre-planning is essential.
Euro pallet: 1,200 × 800 mm. Standard/UK pallet: 1,200 × 1,000 mm.
Validated storage protocols available for pharma and biologics applications.

superstore.tagline: Pallet capacity for Crystal Super Store units. Modular, high-volume portable cold storage from −30°C to +25°C.
notes: Super Store units can be linked as multi-module configurations for larger volumes.
Modular design allows expansion without new civil construction.
Euro pallet: 1,200 × 800 mm. Standard/UK pallet: 1,200 × 1,000 mm.
Temperature range: −30°C to +25°C — suitable for both chilled and frozen storage.
